title: Meaningful Radiographic and Metabolic Response to Enzalutamide Plus Radium-223 Therapy in Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer With PSA-Discordant Progression: A Case Report.
abstract: The combination of enzalutamide and radium-223 has demonstrated clinical efficacy in metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer; however, real-world evidence remains limited, particularly with PSA-discordant progression.
trial_name: Enzalutamide plus radium-223 in metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer
